final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: brand color palette + typography specification sheet, flat design
Composition: structured layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and font specimens side by side
Subject: brand identity system for 染秋 (RAN QIU)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: warm, poetic, meditative
Color palette: inspired by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, amber — warm ochres, burnt oranges, deep reds, muted golds, sandalwood browns, soft persimmon blush
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 染秋, RAN QIU, 桂花乌龙, 琥珀枫叶, 柿霜暮色
Constraints: display swatches labeled with hex or color names; include Chinese and Latin typeface specimens; layout must read as a formal brand guideline reference sheet
Avoid:
